name: Stage 1
description: Conservative tune. ~+15-18% torque, drivability-friendly. Lifts injection, rail pressure and torque limiter at higher RPM/load only. Compatible with stock turbo and stock injectors.

edits.comment: +18% main fueling at high RPM x high load (rows 7..15 x cols 11..15).
+11% rail pressure at mid-high RPM x high load. Capped to keep within injector spray-in window.
+7% transient fueling at high load - improves throttle response.
+5% boost target at mid RPM x mid-high load. Conservative to avoid overspeeding the stock turbo.
+13% torque limit ceiling at mid-to-high RPM (rows 4..15), capped at 9000.

options.label: EGR off (recommended for diesels)
options.description: Software EGR delete: saturates the phase-of-injection map to its own factory ceiling. The ECU sees a flat reference and disengages EGR closed-loop control. No hardware blanking plate required. Strongly recommended for long-term engine cleanliness on diesel - prevents intake soot build-up and EGR valve sticking.

edits.comment: Flatten phase-of-injection map to its factory maximum to disengage EGR loop.
